content:
🔥 badapple_in_tg | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable users to play video animations within Telegram chats by converting videos into custom animated emoji sticker packs.
✨ Key Features: • Video to animated emoji sticker pack conversion • Playing animations (e.g., Bad Apple) in Telegram chats using custom emoji • Multi-bot architecture to bypass Telegram API limits • Customizable grid size for emoji animation
📖 Summary: This repository provides two Python bots for Telegram: a "cutter bot" that converts videos into animated emoji sticker packs, and a "player bot" that plays animations like Bad Apple using these custom emoji in Telegram chats. It leverages multiple bots to overcome Telegram API rate limits.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
